title: Compliance: rust/lichen-hal/src/storage.rs key storage
description: Policy: 06-security.md §15.2. File: rust/lichen-hal/src/storage.rs. Status: COMPLIANT. Seed persisted via NonVolatile trait abstraction (allows HSE or flash with readout protection). load_seed/save_seed use proper encapsulation.
